Tooling Atlas

An atlas of the tools behind technology leadership

Tooling Atlas

180 tools · 25 threads · 18 countries · 552–2024

Lead in the tools and you tend to lead in the field — and the lead keeps moving. Each one here is a tool someone built and others picked up.

180tools
25threads
18countries
552–2024years spanned

The four jobs a tool does

Every tool here does one of four jobs, and they fall in order.

01◇Measuresee what is there — a microscope, an X-ray, a way to read DNA
02◯Modelreason about it — an equation or rule that predicts without building
03△Makebuild one working copy — a single transistor, engine, or molecule
04▦Manufacturebuild a billion, cheap and identical, on a factory floor

See it, understand it, build one, build a million.

Seven ways to read it
